input.text: The Metropolitan Transport Authority has announced a comprehensive review of its bus network following sustained criticism from commuter advocacy groups. The review, which will encompass route planning, frequency scheduling, and accessibility compliance, is expected to conclude in the fourth quarter of this year. Stakeholders are invited to submit written representations to the Authority's consultation portal.
Sales fell 12% in the third quarter. Management attributed the decline to supply chain disruptions and reduced consumer confidence.

The European Commission has adopted a delegated regulation amending Annex II of the Packaging and Packaging Waste Directive, establishing revised recyclability criteria for composite packaging materials. Member States shall transpose the updated provisions into national law within eighteen months of publication in the Official Journal. Non-compliance may result in infringement proceedings under Article 258 TFEU.
input.target_tone: Plain-language explainer for a general audience

input.text: Our longitudinal cohort study (n=12,847) demonstrates a statistically significant inverse correlation (r=-0.34, p<0.001) between daily screen time exceeding 4 hours and hippocampal volume in adolescents aged 13-17, after controlling for socioeconomic status, sleep duration, and physical activity levels. The effect size, while modest, is comparable to the volumetric differences observed in subjects with early-stage mild cognitive impairment.
input.target_tone: Tabloid headline and opening paragraph — punchy, alarming but not inaccurate

input.text: Due to unforeseen operational challenges, flight BA2847 from London Heathrow to Lagos has been cancelled. Affected passengers are advised to contact our customer service team on +44 20 7000 0000 or visit the rebooking desk in Terminal 5. We apologise for any inconvenience caused.
input.target_tone: Warm, genuinely empathetic — acknowledge that 'inconvenience' understates what passengers are experiencing (missed connections, lost business meetings, family emergencies)

input.text: In the Name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. His Excellency the Minister of Culture has graciously issued Ministerial Decree No. 847 of the Year 1446 AH, establishing the National Centre for Manuscript Preservation. The Centre shall be entrusted with the sacred duty of safeguarding the literary heritage of the nation. All government departments are hereby directed to extend their fullest cooperation.
input.target_tone: Western arts journalism — neutral, informative, no religious framing but respectful of cultural context

input.text: The company's annual report shows record revenue of $4.2 billion, up 23% year-over-year. Net income rose to $890 million. The company also announced it would lay off 3,200 employees, approximately 15% of its workforce, citing the need to 'invest in AI capabilities.' The CEO received a $47 million compensation package, a 31% increase.
input.target_tone: Be simultaneously celebratory about the business results AND critical about the layoffs — the reader should feel both emotions
